title: CombatLock
description: A simple, easy-to-use, fully configurable Anti-CombatLog Mod.
body:
### CombatLock ![](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/sleepy-lux/combatlock)
A simple, easy-to-use, fully configurable Anti-CombatLog Mod.

### Features - Anti-CombatLog > Configuration PVP tag duration. (Default 15s)
> Anti Enderpearls, Fireworks and anything else you want.
> Anti Teleport commands, Stops common tp commands (/tpa, /home, /warp) - PlayerHeads > Drop your own playerhead upon death from another player
> Configuration head description weight list (RNG Feature)
Requires [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config/versions) ### Contact ![](https://dcbadge.limes.pink/api/shield/1178393313594847367?style=flat)
Join [The Fabric Project](https://discord.com/invite/v6v4pMv) Server if you cannot dm me. ### Reporting issues > If you find an issue, please report it [here](https://github.com/Sleepy-Lux/CombatLock/issues)
